name: retroboards-browser-evidence
description: Playwright browser-evidence run for RetroBoards Gate A (desktop + mobile capture).

scripts.evidence: bash prepare.sh && playwright test gate-a.spec.ts server-drafts.spec.ts appeals.spec.ts api-tokens.spec.ts providers.spec.ts invitations.spec.ts thread-intelligence.spec.ts
scripts.evidence:passkeys: bash prepare.sh && playwright test passkeys.spec.ts totp.spec.ts
scripts.evidence:dark: RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 bash prepare.sh && playwright test server-drafts.spec.ts
scripts.a11y: RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 bash prepare.sh && playwright test a11y.spec.ts package-review.spec.ts && playwright test thread-intelligence.spec.ts --grep 'no-JS|axe'
scripts.evidence:packages: RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 bash prepare.sh && RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 playwright test package-security.spec.ts
scripts.evidence:packages:prodlike: RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 npm run prepare-db:prodlike && RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 bash prodlike-env.sh playwright test package-security.spec.ts
scripts.evidence:integrations: RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 bash prepare.sh && RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 playwright test package-integrations.spec.ts api-tokens.spec.ts webhooks.spec.ts package-security.spec.ts
scripts.evidence:prodlike: npm run prepare-db:prodlike && bash prodlike-env.sh playwright test gate-a.spec.ts server-drafts.spec.ts appeals.spec.ts
scripts.evidence:dark:prodlike: RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 npm run prepare-db:prodlike && RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 bash prodlike-env.sh playwright test server-drafts.spec.ts
scripts.a11y:prodlike: RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 npm run prepare-db:prodlike && RB_BROWSER_DARK_SURFACES=1 bash prodlike-env.sh playwright test a11y.spec.ts
